description_long: This is a plush toy designed to resemble a whimsical butterfly character. It features a round gray head with large, shiny, brown eyes and a small, subtle mouth, giving it a cute and friendly appearance. The toy has two black-tipped antennae and a pink flower accessory on its head. Its wings are large, vibrant, and gradient from purple to pink with black edges, adding a striking visual element. The body is dressed in a pale yellow dress with faint flower patterns and a yellow-orange band around the chest. The arms and legs are simple and rounded, contributing to the soft, huggable look typical of stuffed toys.
description: A cute butterfly-themed stuffed toy with large purple wings, a yellow dress, and a pink flower accessory. It has a round gray head, big shiny eyes, and soft, rounded limbs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the butterfly's face, pink flower accessory, yellow dress, and both wings fully spread.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, one wing, and the flower accessory, with the dress's side visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full expanse of the butterfly wings and the back of the head and dress.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the opposite profile, with the wing and flower accessory visible from a different angle.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is friendly and neutral, with large, shiny eyes and a small, subtle mouth. There are no eyebrows or exaggerated features, giving it a gentle and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms slightly out to the sides and legs together, head facing forward.
